summary: All 9 features verified successfully. Personal mode rollback complete with all 6 LHS sidebar sections (Dashboard, Investments, Planning, Research, Settings, Tools) and 5 dashboard tabs (Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Insights, Transactions - NO Investments tab). Data isolation working correctly: P1 Thompson shows $1,608,800 NW with 12 holdings, P2 Chen shows $5,200,000 NW with 7 holdings. Profile tabs show correct goals for each client.

issues: Retirement Readiness gauge shows 0% with 'At Risk' badge - API not returning confidence score (mock data limitation, not a bug)
DataCloneError warnings from emergent-main.js - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PERSONAL MODE SIDEBAR: PASS - All 6 sections present (Dashboard, Investments, Planning, Research, Settings, Tools)
PERSONAL MODE TABS: PASS - Exactly 5 tabs (Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Insights, Transactions) - NO Investments tab
P1 THOMPSON OVERVIEW: PASS - Shows 'David & Sarah Thompson', Net Worth $1,608,800, Gross Assets $2,278,000, Liabilities $669,200, Age 50, Retire at 67
P2 CHEN OVERVIEW: PASS - Shows 'Michael & Lisa Chen', Net Worth $5,200,000, Gross Assets $5,200,000, Liabilities $0, Age 49, Retire at 60
P1 THOMPSON INVESTMENTS: PASS - Total Assets $2,278,000, 12 holdings, Property/Super/Shares allocation, Thompson rebalancing data
P2 CHEN INVESTMENTS: PASS - Total Assets $5,200,000, 7 holdings, Trust Portfolio in allocation, Chen-specific rebalancing (Trust Equities, Fixed Income, Alternatives)
P1 THOMPSON PROFILE: PASS - Shows David & Sarah Thompson, Net Worth $1,608,800, Goals: Retirement at 67, Emergency fund $60K
P2 CHEN PROFILE: PASS - Shows Michael & Lisa Chen, Net Worth $5,200,000, Goals: Retirement at 60, Sophie's university
PERSONAL MODE DEFAULT DATA: PASS - Shows Thompson data by default
test_credentials: No auth required. For P1: set localStorage app_mode='adviser', selected_client={id:'thompson_family',...}. For P2: set selected_client={id:'chen_family',...}. For Personal: set app_mode='personal', remove selected_client. Always set disclaimer_accepted='true'.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data in PersonalDashboard.jsx, InvestmentsOverview.jsx, ClientProfileTab.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal mode and adviser mode data isolation verified. Key data-testid values: personal-dashboard, unified-client-overview, client-tab-overview, client-tab-investments, client-tab-profile, tab-overview, tab-net-worth, tab-wealth-trends, tab-insights, tab-transactions. Compliance modal may appear - dismiss with 'I Understand & Accept' button. DashboardRouter at /dashboard renders UnifiedClientOverview when mode=adviser+client selected, else UnifiedDashboard (which embeds PersonalDashboard).
